summary: Frontend testing completed for WebSocket real-time updates and Find a Photographer modal fix. All 6 features tested and verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 errors in console - may be using wrong user_id format

critical_code_review_comments: Find a Photographer modal correctly has only ONE X button (from Dialog component) - double X button fix verified
LineupManagerDrawer shows 'Live' indicator with Wifi icon when WebSocket connects
WebSocket connection confirmed in console: [LineupWS] Connected to lineup e1bb4aaa-f991-4cd9-92dd-88ce82a8bc83
Captain badge displays correctly as 'You (Captain)' with 'Session organizer' subtitle
Crew members show payment status badges (Pending/Paid)
Available spots section shows invite button and count
Lock Lineup & Confirm Session button (green) and Cancel Lineup button (red outline) both present
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test booking at Test Beach with invite_code ELOE76
context_for_next_testing_agent: All WebSocket and modal features working. Test booking at Test Beach with 2/4 crew, $25/person. WebSocket connects successfully showing 'Live' indicator. Find a Photographer modal has single X button from Dialog component.

find_photographer_modal_single_x_button.notes: Modal has exactly 1 X button (from Dialog component). Analysis: xButtonCount=1, absoluteButtonCount=1. The duplicate X button issue has been fixed.

lineup_manager_live_indicator.notes: Shows 'Live' text with Wifi icon in drawer header when WebSocket connects. Console confirms: [LineupWS] Connected to lineup e1bb4aaa-f991-4cd9-92dd-88ce82a8bc83

lineup_manager_captain_badge.notes: Shows 'You (Captain)' with 'Session organizer' subtitle and yellow 'Captain' badge

lineup_manager_crew_payment_status.notes: Shows crew member 'Test User E1' with 'Share: $25.00' and 'Pending' status badge

lineup_manager_available_spots.notes: Shows '2 spots available' with 'Invite friends to split the cost' text and invite button

lineup_manager_lock_button.notes: Green 'Lock Lineup & Confirm Session' button visible and clickable
